findings.evidence: Method body contains 10 lines of code and performs multiple tasks like taking order, notifying for promotion, and applying discounts.
Method `orderWithUnnecessaryDetails` has 7 parameters: pizzaType, size, crustType, toppings, extraCheese, discountCode.
The `takeOrder` method is called twice with the same argument in the `duplicateMethod`.
The `chainOfMethods` method calls `accessInternalDetails` which initiates a chain of method calls.
The `middlemanMethod` simply delegates the call to `middleMethod` without adding any behavior.
The `middleMethod` simply delegates the call to `realMethod` without adding any behavior.
The `accessInternalDetails` method directly accesses the private member `chef->isBusy()`.
The `refusedBequest` method is empty, indicating it doesn't use inherited functionality.
The `handleComplaint` method uses an `if-else if` chain to handle different complaint types.

findings.evidence: Method body contains 10 lines and performs multiple unrelated tasks like ordering pizza, complaining, and applying discounts.
Method has 7 parameters: pizzaType, size, crustType, toppings, extraCheese, discountCode.
The line `this->orderPizza("Cheese");` appears twice in the method.
Method calls `accessInternalDetails()` which leads to a chain of method calls.
Method `middlemanMethod` only delegates to `middleMethod` without adding any behavior.
Method `middleMethod` only delegates to `realMethod` without adding any behavior.
Method directly accesses `pizzaShop->getCashier()->hurryUpChef()`, violating encapsulation.
The method uses an `if-else if` chain to handle different complaints.
The method `anotherUnusedMethod` is never called within the file.
The method `refusedBequest` is empty and overrides an inherited method.
